manifest.title: LMHG Louisville SEO and AI Visibility Dashboard
manifest.description: Interactive dashboard summarizing the DataForSEO baseline for Louisville Mental Health Group local SEO, AI answer visibility, competitors, spend, and implementation priorities.

charts.title: Local Grid Best Rank by Keyword

blocks.body:
# LMHG Louisville SEO and AI Visibility Dashboard
DataForSEO baseline for Louisville Mental Health Group. The run stayed far under budget and exposes three urgent themes: crawler access, AI citation gaps, and head-term/local-grid ranking work.

## Spend and API Mix
The run used a broad but tightly scoped mix of SERP, Labs, AI Optimization, Business Data, Backlinks, and OnPage endpoints.

## AI and Agentic Search Visibility
Direct LLM responses occasionally found LMHG, but Google AI Mode did not cite the site for tested Louisville prompts. These charts and tables show where copy and FAQ answers need to be made more citable.

## Louisville Ranking Priorities
The highest-volume terms are therapy, therapist, and counseling Louisville KY. Case management is the clear current strength; child, family, in-home, and community-based services need stronger local and answer-engine signals.

## Competitors and Off-Page Signals
Kentucky Counseling Center, UofL Health, Seven Counties, LifeStance, Best Life, and other local providers repeatedly appear in SERP and LLM citation surfaces. Backlink cleanup is also required because DataForSEO sees many broken backlink targets.

## Implementation Backlog
The backlog is ordered for impact: make the site crawlable to SEO tooling, fix soft-404 behavior, then improve entity copy/schema/FAQ surfaces for local and agentic queries.

action_backlog.action: Fix Cloudflare/security rules so DataForSEO OnPage or chosen SEO crawler can fetch production pages.
action_backlog.evidence: OnPage crawls ended forbidden_http_header with 0 pages crawled.

action_backlog.action: Stop redirecting unknown URLs to homepage as 200; return real 404/410 or specific 301.
action_backlog.evidence: Live no-cost inspection found missing URLs 301 to homepage then 200.

action_backlog.action: Add concise answer blocks and FAQ schema for Medicaid, case management, in-home/community-based care, teen/child/family therapy, and provider selection.
action_backlog.evidence: LMHG cited in 8/48 direct LLM responses and 0/17 AI Mode prompts.

action_backlog.action: Protect /case-management/ as canonical owner and expand practical eligibility/support copy.
action_backlog.evidence: Ranks #1 for mental health case management Louisville KY and #3 for case management Louisville KY.

action_backlog.action: Strengthen /individual-counseling/, /services/, and homepage around therapy, therapist, and counseling Louisville KY.
action_backlog.evidence: Highest city/DMA volume terms; LMHG visible but not dominant.

action_backlog.action: Mirror GBP service facts into site schema and copy; add Q&A child-therapy FAQ.
action_backlog.evidence: Claimed GBP has rich services, 4.4 rating, and one relevant child session Q&A.

action_backlog.action: Triage broken backlinks and 520-status link targets; preserve useful citations.
Activate route-level _lmhg_* SEO/schema rendering before treating sidecar as production SEO-ready.
action_backlog.evidence: Sidecar noindex and rendered schema thinner than planned Core30 metadata.
